name: Tavaborole
description: Tavaborale is a novel, boron-based topical antifungal medication for the treatment of onychomycosis, a fungal infection of the nail and nail bed due to *Trichophyton rubrum* or *Trichophyton mentagrophytes* infection. Tavaborole functions by inhibiting Leucyl-tRNA synthetase, or LeuRS, an essential fungal enzyme required for protein synthesis and for the catalysis of ATP-dependent ligation of L-leucine to tRNA(Leu).
indication: Indicated for the treatment of onychomycosis (a fungal infection) of the toenails due to Trichophyton rubrum or Trichophyton mentagrophytes.
toxicity: Tavaborole is generally well tolerated with most adverse events reported as mild and not related to treatment. Treatment related adverse events that occurred in >1 % of participants include application site exfoliation, application site erythema, and application site dermatitis, and ingrown toenail.
mechanismOfAction: Tavaborole exerts its antifungal activity by blocking cellular protein synthesis through the formation of an adduct with cytoplasmic leucyl-aminoacyl transfer RNA (tRNA) synthetase.
pharmacodynamics: After a single dose, the mean (± standard deviation) peak concentration (Cmax) of tavaborole was 3.54 ± 2.26 ng/mL (n=21 with measurable concentrations, range 0.618-10.2 ng/mL, LLOQ=0.5 ng/mL), and the mean AUClast was 44.4 ± 25.5 ng*hr/mL (n=21). After 2 weeks of daily dosing, the mean Cmax was 5.17 ± 3.47 ng/mL (n=24, range 1.51­-12.8 ng/mL), and the mean AUCτ was 75.8 ± 44.5 ng*hr/mL.

interactions.name: Cisapride
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cisapride can be increased when it is combined with Tavaborole.

interactions.name: Progesterone
interactions.description: The absorption of Progesterone can be decreased when combined with Tavaborole.

interactions.name: Dofetilide
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Dofetilide can be increased when it is combined with Tavaborole.

interactions.name: Quinidine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Quinidine can be increased when it is combined with Tavaborole.

interactions.name: Ranolazine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Ranolazine can be increased when it is combined with Tavaborole.

interactions.name: Buspirone
interactions.description: The metabolism of Buspirone can be decreased when combined with Tavaborole.

interactions.name: Didanosine
interactions.description: Didanosine can cause a decrease in the absorption of Tavaborole resulting in a reduced serum concentration and potentially a decrease in efficacy.
